title: cryptantha humilis var. ovina
intro: Cryptantha humilis var. ovina is a small, flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Cryptantha humilis var. ovina include its ability to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various digestive issues. Cryptantha humilis var. ovina can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or infusion for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential risks.
